description: Letter from Natan b. Khalaf to Abū l-Faraj Ismāʿīl b. ʿEzra and ʿEzra b. Ismāʿīl. Either the sender or the addressees are in Fustat. In Arabic script, with one line in Judaeo-Arabic on verso (part of the address?). Dating: Probably 11th century. Written on parchment. Fragment (upper part only). Mentions shipments of flax and probably several other goods. Needs further examination. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מכתב מנתן ב. ח'לף לאבו אל-פרג' ישמעאל ב. עזרא ועזרא ב. ישמעאל. בכתב ערבי. תאריך: כנראה המאה ה-11. על קלף. קטע. מזכיר משלוחי פשתן וסחורות אחרות
